name: ALAN
description:
The character from the sad suicidal infusing Roblox game Alan and Liam no one requested me to make this I made this cause one I have nothing to do two I felt bad after I played that game I heard I cried in both endings so I say to who finds this I hope you try the game

Link is right here look it up in the safari app or if you have Roblox just type Alan and Liam in the search.

creator: The story teller
